name: RENEWCELL AB RENEWCELL ORD SHS
summary: RENEWCELL AB RENEWCELL ORD SHS is a Swedish company focused on developing and commercializing a technology to recycle textiles, specifically turning used cotton and other cellulose-based textiles into new raw materials. The company aims to create a sustainable textile industry by reducing waste and reliance on virgin materials and is headquartered in Sundsvall, Sweden.
